chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4616 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. 02.02.2026. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. This is the second date on which the matter has been put up for orders as to non-prosecution, with compliance having not been made albeit time having been granted on the previous date which suggest that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
